revision.text: {{Humor}}

revision.comment: N. obody I. S G. ay G. ordon E. r ect R. pen is

revision.text: {{Humor}}

{{Humor}}
avid supporter of "e"

{{Humor}}
<del>avid supporter of "e"</del>

revision.comment: don't tell me what to do >:(
revision.text:
{{Humor}}
you won't tell me what to do ok

{{Humor}}
you won't tell me what to do ok

{{Humor}}
Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|Bongo_figure-British_Museum_(2)]] == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|Toy_soldier_(AM_1996.165.18-2)]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|British_Museum_18]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee.

{{Humor}}
Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰
== Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]]
I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee.

{{Humor}} {{Db|G3}}
Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰
== Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]]
I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee.
{{ill|I|de}} {{ill|hatred|lt=hate|simple|hatred}} {{ill|Red link|lt=Red links|simple}}
<big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big>YOU SUCK!</big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big>

<big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big><big>YOU S</big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big></big>hould love yourself sm because you are amazing and wonderful and deserve happiness :>
Scary flying avacado

Scary flying avacado
frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd

Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie
frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd

Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon

{{Humor}}
Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰
== Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]]
I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee.
Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie
frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd
ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this
Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon

I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee.

revision.comment: Don't mind if I do D:<
revision.text:
{{Humor}} Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and others [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Wikipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|blocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
[[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Uncle Wikipe-tan-blood no text.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[United States of America]] has [[US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.

{{Humor}} Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and others [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Wikipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|blocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
[[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Uncle Wikipe-tan-blood no text.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[United States of America]] has [[US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.

{{Humor}} Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
[[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Uncle Wikipe-tan-blood no text.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[United States of America]] has [[US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.

{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' revision.comment: ([[c:GR|GR]]) [[c:COM:FR|File renamed]]: [[File:Uncle Wikipe-tan-blood no text.svg]] → [[File:Angry Wikipe-tan.svg]] [[c:COM:FR#FR2|Criterion 2]] (meaningless or ambiguous name) · Names that are not meaningless, but do not describe the file; harmonize with original png
revision.text:
{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. [[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Angry Wikipe-tan.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[United States of America]] has [[US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.
==w0+== [[File:Noun confusion Delwar 781825.svg|right|thumb|50px]] Eh?`

{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
[[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Angry Wikipe-tan.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[United States of America]] has [[US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.

{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd == ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this == Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' revision.text:
{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd == ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this == Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd == ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this == Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
[[File:Stop x nuvola.svg|40px|left]][[File:Angry Wikipe-tan.svg|80px|right]]
You have been '''[[WP:Blocking policy|b l o c k e d]]''' from editing for a period of '''50 seconds''' because the [[:en:United States of America|United States of America]] has [[:en:US state|50 states]].
Anyways you are '''B L O C K E D !''' If you think there are good reasons for being unblocked, please consider reviewing Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Humor|sense of humor guide]], then if you seen this, you or others may write something at the bottom of this subpage.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FVandalize_this_subpage here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Humor}} too bad theyre not here to respond to this anymore Hello I am Elizabeth Tudor, Fujiwara, Reilly, Windsor, York, Of Cleve's. This is me: [[File:Bongo figure-British Museum (2).jpg|thumb|center|120px]] Yes yes I know I'm stunning. 🫰 Hey guys I'm kinda [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]]🥺🥺🥺 I hope you support 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 == Time in the army == It was absolutely appalling. The army commander sir Johnson, Amaterasu, hehrhehharf, was my commander. Me in the military: [[File:Toy soldier (AM 1996.165.18-2).jpg|center|thumb|120px]] Ruuuuule Britannia == War == War was tough thou shalt not need to imagine it. This was a photo: [[File:British Museum 18.jpg|thumb|center|120px|]] I fought along side Emperor kanmu to defeat south Africa and won. == British == British. == Puppy == [[File:20110425 German Shepherd Dog 8505.jpg|I know, adorable|thumb|center|120px]] == Final == This is it for the Wikipedia page. Have a good rest of the day. Rule Meeeeeeee. Scary flying avacado this is kinda funny not gonna lie frwu9hgreaoinwetnoitbewnuonobtues jobetqni0bt4pwibipwetbn0it402ijbni04tb20ji4tb2j0in0i4tb2onkbt42njo4t2obnj ojgm llwrgoknpigsj0i0jgiajjIjajjd == ʍʇɟ ɯsᴉlɐpuɐʌ uʍopǝpᴉsdn hey do u actually check this == Yeah I do check it but been a bit stressed lately ok sry, hope you get unstressed soon == November 2023 == [[File:Stop hand nuvola.svg|30px]] This is your '''only warning'''; if you and smothers [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|disrupt]] and [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalize]] Smockipedia again, as you did at [[User:Immanuelle/Vandalize this subpage]], you may as well be '''[[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|smocked]] without further notice!!!''' ''What an interesting subpage you got here.. hehe, don't mind me.''
